purpose: Convert per-track score/audio waveform envelopes into elongated 3D resonant bodies placed in the Glass Reader plane.

conversion_rule.waveform_extraction: per-track note timing, duration, velocity, pitch range, and envelope samples
conversion_rule.body_shape: elongated resonant capsule / bubble body with amplitude-radius modulation
conversion_rule.spatial_placement: track lane, phase index, role, and pitch center determine Glass Reader placement
conversion_rule.visual_chain: score -> sound -> waveform -> 3D body -> Glass Reader
